methodology: Articles sourced from Virginia-specific RSS feeds and Google News RSS, filtered for AI/technology/workforce relevance, then assessed by Claude against the scenario framework. Each article is tagged with the region it most affects and the scenario it signals toward.

signals.title: New partnership between VCU and AI Ready RVA aims to boost AI education, innovation and community impact - VCU News
signals.signal_reading: VCU's partnership with AI Ready RVA signals institutional commitment to distributed AI literacy beyond elite tech workers, creating peer learning networks that could democratize capability across Richmond's diverse community sectors.

signals.title: RC-RV partners with ed2go to launch innovative, on-demand workforce training programs - Roanoke College
signals.signal_reading: On-demand workforce training through ed2go platforms suggests shallow, platform-mediated AI adoption in transitioning economies—access without depth, solving immediate skill gaps but not building indigenous AI development capacity.

signals.title: 6,000-acre innovation district launches in Manassas
signals.signal_reading: A 6,000-acre innovation district anchored by George Mason in Manassas concentrates research infrastructure, venture capital access, and talent pipelines in NoVA, reinforcing the metro hub's structural advantages over rural regions.

signals.title: Doug Hoven on How AI Is Changing the Way Homes Are Bought and Sold in Hampton Roads - The Ritz Herald
signals.signal_reading: AI tools transforming real estate transactions in Hampton Roads exemplifies shallow, consumer-facing platform adoption—efficiency gains without building local AI development expertise or addressing workforce displacement risks in traditional sectors.

signals.title: The Pulse: AI tools show bias when users disclose autism; dentists expand screening questions; a new recovery conference comes to Roanoke
signals.signal_reading: Research revealing AI bias against autistic users highlights how marginalized communities in rural Virginia face compounded disadvantages—neither access to deep AI literacy nor inclusive design in the platforms reaching them.
